name: "The Casting" with Anya Taylor-Joy
description:
"The Casting", with Anya Taylor-Joy.

Despite having tasted the honeys of fame, after some of her films had poor box office and horrible reviews, Anya has had difficulty getting roles, which has caused her savings to begin to run out. Rent, services and debts accumulate, and she is beginning to become desperate for money, being willing to participate in any film, as long as she receives income. Taking this situation into account, her manager sends her to audition for a movie that is far outside of what Anya is used to. She gets ready very elegantly and heads to the location where the casting is going to take place.
creator: Gragodoya
